title: Create: Copies & Cats
description: Adds more copycats to Create mod!
body:
Create: Copies & Cats, This mod adds more copycats from create into your world! allowed create versions: 0.5.1f, 0.5.1b, 0.5.1c, 0.5.1d, 0.5.1e. *I cant sow so no fabric

 

This mod *so far, will add copycats kinda like snow layers, all the things it will add are the following: 2/16, 4/16, 6/16, copycat slab, 10/16, 12/16, 14/16, 16/16.

These blocks can be used as deco, and can all be placed vertically!

 

No survival recipies yet, if you find any glitches or want to suggest something you can comment here or message me on discord redcat.exe.

 

Have fun!
